title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns · Program Brief: Oop Observer Events
summary: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop observer events increment in an extensible library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Publish domain events to decouple secondary reactions while defining ordering, failure, duplication, and delivery semantics.
Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
